paper_sources.description: One record per uploaded/approved exam paper PDF.

fields.subject: human readable subject name
fields.session: exam session if known, for example May or November
fields.license_note: why MindCraft is allowed to process this file

fields.figures: paths or ids for extracted diagrams
fields.answer_region: optional markscheme snippet/reference, never used verbatim in student questions

question_patterns.description: Aggregated patterns extracted from many paper questions. These ground generation without copying paper wording.

fields.stem_shape: abstract description of the question setup
fields.data_shape: table, graph, diagram, plain text, multi-part, etc.
fields.skills_tested: ordered list of operations the student must perform
fields.generation_template: safe abstract template, not copied wording
fields.source_question_ids: ids used to derive the pattern
